project_name: Jai Bharat Mitra Mandal - Collection App

headings.usage: Dashboard stats, Section Titles, and Receipt Numbers (e.g., JBM-2026-0001). Use tight letter spacing.

body.usage: Form labels, donor names, notes, lists. Chosen for high legibility outdoors and clarity in dense data lists.

layouts.core_strategy: Mobile-first, thumb-friendly. Designed for fast door-to-door use.
layouts.spacing: Generous touch zones. Use gap-4 between form fields, and p-4 to p-6 for screen margins.
layouts.grid: Dashboard uses a dense bento grid (grid-cols-2). Highlight 'Total Funds' across 2 columns.
layouts.navigation: Sticky bottom bar or large Floating Action Button (FAB) for the 'New Collection' action to ensure thumb reachability.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Flat Solid surfaces. Avoid excessive glassmorphism on forms to maintain clarity under strong sunlight outdoors.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border (#E7E5E4) on cards, rounded-xl. rounded-2xl for modals/drawers.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient subtle shadow only on floating elements like FABs, offline sync banner, or sticky headers.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use lucide-react. Ensure icons are minimum 24px.

components.forms: Use Shadcn Inputs. Minimum height 48px for all touch targets. Use type='number' for amount to trigger numeric keypad.
components.toggles: Use Shadcn ToggleGroup or segmented control style for Cash / Mark as Paid. Provide distinct visual selected states.
components.modals: Use Shadcn Drawer (bottom sheet) for mobile context (filters, action menus) over Dialogs.
components.badges: Use rounded-full badges for Volunteer Roles (Admin/Volunteer/Deactivated) and Offline Sync indicators (Saffron/Yellow banner).
components.receipt: Render receipt preview in a clean, bordered white box with subtle festive pattern background. Include clear WhatsApp share CTA.

motion.interactions: Micro-interactions on press (active:scale-95). Smooth slide-up for bottom sheets.
motion.transitions: transition-colors duration-200 for hovers. Do not use 'transition-all'.

accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 48px height/width for all interactive elements.
accessibility.contrast: Ensure primary colors against white meet 4.5:1 contrast. Adjust Saffron to #E65A15 if needed for strict AA, or use bold text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='submit-collection-btn').

image_urls.description: Three Lord Ganesha statuettes. Use as the hero/branding image for the Google Sign-In page. Apply gradient overlay to anchor text.
Seamless geometric festive pattern. Use with 5-10% opacity as a subtle background texture on the dashboard headers or receipt view.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: CRITICAL: Generate/Edit `.js` and `.jsx` files ONLY. Do NOT create `.tsx` or `.ts` files.
Do NOT use default Inter for headings. Implement Cabinet Grotesk or Manrope.
Use solid Indian festive colors (Saffron, Marigold). No generic SaaS blue.
Optimize UI for mobile views (use max-w-md mx-auto wrapper if rendering on a desktop browser to simulate mobile app).
DO NOT use fully transparent backgrounds on headers or sticky navs; always use a solid or heavy blur surface.
Ensure all buttons have interaction animations (scale, color shift) excluding layout transforms.
Use `sonner` for offline sync, copy, and receipt sent notifications.
Left-align all data-dense forms and text; avoid center alignment except for hero titles.
Ensure data-testid attributes on every button, input, and list item.
Build the PDF Receipt preview cleanly so it's easy to read and screenshot/share via WhatsApp.
